scripts.dev: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run api" "npm run web"
scripts.db:up: (docker start bucketbudget-db 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name bucketbudget-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=bucketbudget -p 5432:5432 postgres:16) && npx wait-on tcp:localhost:5432 -t 30000
scripts.db:migrate: dotnet ef database update --project src/BucketBudget.Infrastructure --startup-project src/BucketBudget.Api
scripts.web: npm install --prefix src/BucketBudget.Web && npm run dev --prefix src/BucketBudget.Web
